title: Thin-lens image distance and lateral magnification
instruction: Implement thin_lens in lens.py. Given focal length f and object distance u (same sign convention: positive for real object to the left of a converging lens, positive f for converging), return (v, m) where 1/f = 1/u + 1/v and lateral magnification m = -v/u. If f or u is zero, or the computed v is non-finite, raise ValueError. Return floats.
difficulty_rationale: Single formula with edge cases; baseline has wrong magnification sign and zero checks.
